message:
🐛 Strip numbered PR template headers from solution extraction (#527)

- Add extractFromNumberedTemplate() to handle "### 1. Why is this PR needed?"
  style templates (used by CoreDNS, Cilium, and many CNCF projects)
- Extract only content paragraphs, skip template question headers
- Strip bare issue references (#1234) left from template sections
- Add numbered template header regex to stripPRTemplate() and cleanText()

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
